changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE assessments ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, assessment_level_id integer DEFAULT NULL, assessment_type_id integer DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description text DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_assessments PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_to_assessment_type FOREIGN KEY (assessment_type_id) REFERENCES assessment_types (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_to_assessment_level FOREIGN KEY (assessment_level_id) REFERENCES assessment_levels (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_assessments_organization ON assessments (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_assessments_organization_id_name ON assessments (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX i_assessments_name ON assessments (name); CREATE INDEX i_assessments_assessment_type ON assessments (assessment_type_id); CREATE INDEX i_assessments_assessment_level ON assessments (assessment_level_id);
